notes:
- Security: IPC server now requires token authentication — prevents unauthorized local processes from sending wallpaper commands
- Security: file copy command restricted to WallShift downloads directory — prevents path traversal
- Security: online image downloads sanitize filenames to prevent path injection
- Security: API keys now decrypted in Rust only — plaintext keys never pass through JavaScript memory
- Security: directory scans protected against symlink loop denial-of-service
- Security: NSIS installer switched to per-user install — auto-updates no longer require UAC elevation
- Cleanup: removed unused internal config module and dead code
